option_line: bffi_mpBuyer4:"The Knight has a point, Menes. I couldn't make an offer without verification."
original: The Knight has a point, Menes. I couldn't make an offer without verification.

Menes laugh is more than a little strained.

"Now now, captain, I have not said I was offering the glove for any kind of sale. And," he glances back at Bornanew, "a lesser man than I might take offense at your implications, sir. My source has impeccable standards, and I assure you the provenance of the piece is most distinguished."

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerVeracity:"Considering my offer, I require full confidence in the item."
original: Considering my offer, I require full confidence in the item.

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerCredits500k:"Let's discuss credits. Would a half-million open the question of a sale?"
original: Let's discuss credits. Would a half-million open the question of a sale?

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerCredits1m:"Let's not waste time. One million credits."
original: Let's not waste time. One million credits.

"Veracity?" An annoyed look crosses Menes face.

"I have nothing to prove; the good name of Yaribay speaks for itself. Besides, we are not even discussing a sale."
"One million credits." Menes can't help but allow a glowing smile to break across his face.

He scoffs. "What do you take me for, a simpleton Luddie farmer from Chalcedon?"

His eyes dart at Bornanew to see if this one landed. $global.jethroName appears to be looking toward another display in one of the side-rooms.

Menes turns back to you, his brow furrowed at Bornanew's impassiveness. "Come now, captain, I was told you're a serious spacer. Ruthless in battle and savvy in trade. Was I so misinformed?"
Something shines in Menes' eyes. "I speak hypothetically, of course," he says, "but I wouldn't begin to think of a sale for anything less than a million credits."

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerCredits1m:"I'll consider a million. But only if it's real."
original: I'll consider a million. But only if it's real.
